notes: Community-reported tournament data from Victory Road (victoryroad.pro) and the open team lists it links on VRPastes. This is a THIRD signal, distinct from the two ranked usage signals (Showdown ladder + Pokémon Champions Battle Data) — it is human-curated event reporting, not aggregate statistics. Limitless has no Pokémon Champions coverage, so this is Victory-Road-only.
